question:
Tumpuses are not small. Tumpuses are yumpuses. Every yumpus is aggressive. Each yumpus is a wumpus. Every wumpus is bright. Each wumpus is a jompus. Jompuses are not liquid. Every jompus is a vumpus. Each vumpus is orange. Every vumpus is an impus. Every impus is not transparent. Each impus is a zumpus. Every zumpus is fruity. Every zumpus is a numpus. Every numpus is sour. Rompuses are not fruity. Numpuses are dumpuses. Sam is a wumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is fruity.
